texts.desc:
2+ monsters, including an "S-Force" monster
While an opponent's monster is in this card's column, your opponent cannot target this card with card effects, also they cannot Special Summon with activated monster effects. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster on the field; move it to another of its controller's Main Monster Zones. You can only use this effect of "S-Force Mystify" once per turn.
texts.name: S-Force Mystify
